9.reason: The array `map` is declared with size [100005][100005], which requires approximately 40GB of memory (10^10 integers). This exceeds the stack/static memory limits of most systems and compilers, causing a compilation or linking error (relocation truncated) or runtime crash. The problem states N (vertices) is at most 100, so this should be reduced to a reasonable size like [105][105].
